summary: The provided literature does not address dose-point evaluation in image-guided brachytherapy; instead, it covers diagnostic gynecological procedures unrelated to radiologic dosimetry. Thus, reliance on such evaluations for assessing vaginal radiation dosage remains unsupported by available evidence.
